pi_items.source: task.json description, setup_task.sh cleanup, and export_result.sh injection script
task.json description, setup_task.sh cleanup, and verifier.py fallback checking

privileged_info_summary: The task entails configuring Splunk index-time routing via UDP port 5140, routing logs to a 'system_logs' index with a default 'legacy_app' sourcetype. Synthetic log payloads are dynamically injected during evaluation via export_result.sh. The verified expectations match the task description and verifier fallback checks, ensuring conditional mapping of '[CRITICAL]' and '[WARN]' logs to 'legacy_app_critical' and 'legacy_app_warn' respectively.
